name: Andromedus
bio: One of the oldest beings in the world -- older than the world itself, if the stories are true -- Andromedus spent thousands of years serving a friend's memory before finally choosing to live among mortals, who have accepted his otherworldly appearance with surprising ease. Perhaps the 21st century really is a more tolerant time.

Now running his own business, he looks like just another blue-skinned entrepreneur, but behind the facade he continues his true work: containing and concealing the supernatural from the common folk. He considers it his mission to keep this world's people protected from the kind of power that comes with that knowledge.

His hands have been especially full lately, keeping the bodies of dead immortals out of the wrong hands. He approached Aluccard about collaborating on the investigation -- Aluccard, still holding his reservations about the blue man, has so far turned him down.
